Dicyandiamide and Limestone: Duty-Free EntryDuty-free treatment pursuant to this chapter of dicyandiamide in item 425.40 and limestone when imported for use in manufacture of cement in item 513.34 of the Tariff Schedules of the United States, by provision for non-application of subsec. (b)(1) of this section, see .section 1823 of this title

children.heading: Determination by President; trade agreements; modification or continuance of existing duties
children.label: a Determination by President; trade agreements; modification or continuance of existing duties

children.text: after , and before , enter into trade agreements with foreign countries or instrumentalities thereof; andJune 30, 1962July 1, 1967

proclaim such modification or continuance of any existing duty or other import restriction, such continuance of existing duty-free or excise treatment, or such additional import restrictions, as he determines to be required or appropriate to carry out any such trade agreement.
